minting_now.description: The throne has been claimed. Royal Apes 2026 brings a new dynasty of digital rulers to the NFT world — powerful, elegant, and unshakable. minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

minting_now.name: Doge Much WoW
minting_now.description:
Much Wow. So NFT. Very 10K. 🐕‍🦺
A digital collection for the degens, the dreamers, and the dog lovers.

minting_now.name: NormieLines
minting_now.description: Normieline is a generative NFT project that transforms “normie” culture through GenArt principles. Algorithmically created variations turn everyday identities into unique digital characters, highlighting the individuality hidden within the ordinary.

minting_now.name: Pixel Of Soul
minting_now.description: PixelOfSoul is a rebellious NFT collection where every character represents a broken soul in digital form. Born from chaos and shaped by attitude, these pixel beings carry unique traits, emotions, and stories that live forever on the blockchain.

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre)

With this partnership, [$PENGU](https://x.com/search?q=%24PENGU&src=cashtag_click) can now be listed on some of the largest retail trading platforms and exchanges used by over 500 million people worldwide. More information to come soon. I’m not the most diplomatic person ou...
Make your move. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden

From the Alley to the Garden We heard you like to move it. Madagascar. 2271km from north to south. 3 weeks. Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
Happy National Anime Day!
